arts.ttl: Report: Arsenal and Aston Villa could rival Liverpool for £50m midfielder
arts.sum: Liverpool could face competition from five other Premier League clubs for the signature of Brazilian midfielder Ederson, according to reports. The Reds have been heavily linked with Ederson in recent months but failed to sign a defensive midfielder over the summer, also missing out on Spain international Martin Zubimendi. arts.ttl: Liverpool star provides positive injury update after early Crystal Palace substitution
arts.sum: Liverpool midfielder Alexis Mac Allister eases fears about a possible injury concern following his early substitution against Crystal Palace.

arts.ttl: Arne Slot delivers injury update on key Liverpool duo
arts.sum: Liverpool duo Alisson and Alexis Mac Allister will receive further assessment after being substituted with injuries in the 1-0 victory over Crystal Palace on Saturday. A statement from Liverpool reads: "Alisson Becker and Alexis Mac Allister will undergo further assessment to determine the severity of the injuries they sustained during Saturday's 1-0 win at Crystal Palace."

arts.sum: Diogo Jota netted the only goal against Crystal Palace to ensure Liverpool spend the October international break at the top of the Premier League table
